title: AN ACT APPROPRIATING FUNDS FOR THE OPERATION OF THE GOVERNMENT OF THE REPUBLIC OF THE PHILIPPINES FROM JANUARY ONE TO DECEMBER THIRTY-ONE, TWO THOUSAND AND NINE, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

chunks.text:
[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9524, January 01, 2009 ]

AN ACT APPROPRIATING FUNDS FOR THE OPERATION OF THE GOVERNMENT OF THE REPUBLIC OF THE PHILIPPINES FROM JANUARY ONE TO DECEMBER THIRTY-ONE, TWO THOUSAND AND NINE, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

See GENERAL APPROPRIATIONS ACT for FISCAL YEAR (FY) 2009 (January 1 - December 31, 2009)
